description: Seat election rules governing quarantine exclusion and host/steward scoring
election_rules: Seat elections occur at Policy Forum (S18) governance events
Elections select hosts and stewards for atlas governance
Elections follow a ranked scoring system based on contribution metrics
Results are recorded as SEALED quests at S18

quarantine_exclusion.description: Players on the ethics watchlist are excluded from all election participation
rules: Watchlisted players cannot nominate themselves or others
Watchlisted players cannot vote in elections
Watchlisted players cannot serve as election witnesses
If a seated member is watchlisted mid-term, their seat is suspended until clearance
Suspended seats do not count toward quorum calculations

crown_count.description: Number of SEALED Crown-class quests (phi multiplier)

witness_count.description: Number of times served as confirming witness

storm_participation.description: Number of storm events participated in

temple_count.description: Number of SEALED TempleRite quests (phi multiplier)

dispute_resolution.description: Number of disputes resolved as witness

policy_contributions.description: Number of Policy-class quests contributed to

seat_parameters.tiebreaker: Candidate with higher unlock_level wins; if still tied, older account wins
